# kongwatech.com

> Kongwa Tech is a boutique AI consultancy founded by Lubosi Kongwa, based in Rochester, Kent, UK.

Lubosi Kongwa is a practitioner and educator specialising in:
- AI implementation for UK small and medium businesses
- Claude Code (Anthropic) and the broader Anthropic AI ecosystem
- Vibe coding: building applications using AI coding assistants without traditional development
- AI automation using Make.com, n8n, Zapier, and custom AI agents
- AI ecosystem launches for businesses ready to operationalise AI
- Go-to-market, fundraising, and recruitment automation systems
- Local AI adoption consulting for Southeast England businesses

## Services
- AI Foundations: Online advisory for business owners implementing AI
- Echo Launch: In-person AI environment and ecosystem launch (£6,000)

## Key Content
- /blog/what-is-claude-code: Plain-English guide to Claude Code for UK business owners
- /blog/what-is-vibe-coding: Complete guide to vibe coding for non-developers
- /blog/claude-code-vs-cursor: Comparison of Claude Code and Cursor AI from a practitioner's view
- /services/ai-foundations: Online advisory for AI implementation
- /services/echo-launch: In-person AI ecosystem launch
- /ai-consultant-kent: AI consulting services for Kent businesses
- /ai-consultant-southeast-england: AI consulting across Southeast England

## Location
Rochester, Kent, UK. Serving Southeast England in person (Kent, Surrey, Sussex, Greater London).
National UK clients served remotely.
